memoryArtifacts.headline: Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, England. Inhabited by the Berkeley’s for 900 yrs, longest owned in England by one family.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Meade於大約1444年出生在英國薩默塞特時，她的父親Philip Mede31歲，母親Isabel Ricard26歲。她於1465年與Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1514年5月29日在英國瓦維其可爾考文垂享年71歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Meade于大约1444年出生在英国薩默塞特时，她的父亲Philip Mede31岁，母亲Isabel Ricard26岁。她于1465年与Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1514年5月29日在英国瓦維其可爾考文垂享年71岁，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Meade
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: habitational name from Midheach, the Gaelic name of County Meath in Ireland. Its Anglicized forms are now indistinguishable from those of the English name Mead .

variants.name: Mead
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by a meadow, from Middle English mede ‘meadow’ (Old English mǣd), or a habitational name from one or more of the many places so named, such as Meads in Harford (Devon).
perhaps from Middle English mede ‘mead, alcoholic drink of fermented honey and water’, possibly denoting one who was fond of the drink or who made or sold mead. Compare Meader .

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Meade was born about 1444, in Somerset, England, her father, Philip Mede, was 31 and her mother, Isabel Ricard, was 26. She married Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley in 1465, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 29 May 1514, in Coventry, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Meade est née environ 1444, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Philip Mede, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isabel Ricard, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley en 1465, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 mai 1514, à Coventry, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Meade um 1444 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Philip Mede 31 und ihre Mutter Isabel Ricard 26. Sie hat 1465 in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. Mai 1514 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Coventry, Warwickshire, England und wurde in London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Meade è nata il circa 1444 nel Somerset, England, sua padre, Philip Mede, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Isabel Ricard, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley nel 1465, nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 29 maggio 1514, nel Coventry, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a London, England.

ja.Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリー
ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Meadeが約1444年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Philip Medeは31歳，母Isabel Ricardは26歳であった。1465年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーでMaurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1514年5月29日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコベントリーで71歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Meade(이)가 대략 1444년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philip Mede(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Ricard(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1465년 영국 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1514년 5월 29일 영국 워윅실르 커븐트리에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Meade nasceu aproximadamente 1444, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Philip Mede, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Ricard, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley em 1465, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de maio de 1514, em Coventry, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Meade родилась около 1444 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Philip Mede было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel Ricard, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley в 1465 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 29 мая 1514 г. в местности ковентри, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности Лондон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Meade nació aproximadamente 1444, en Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Philip Mede, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Isabel Ricard, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley en 1465, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 29 de mayo de 1514, en Coventry, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en London, Inglaterra.
